body.title: reading_list: collapse queued→pending
body.result: Migrated 274 queued→pending rows in DB. Updated learner.py: default 'queued'→'pending', removed 'queued' from valid statuses, updated icon map + feeder query. 567 tests green.
body.description: reading_list.status has two synonyms: queued (add_to_reading_list tool default) and pending (schema default). Both mean the same thing; feeder handles both with status IN ('pending','queued'). Fix: migrate all queued rows to pending, change tool default to pending, remove queued from valid status list and docstrings.
